_comment: Add your game by appending an object to the 'games' array and opening a PR. Fields: name, tagline, url (play link), creator, creator_url (optional), image (optional URL), tags (optional array), featured (optional bool).

games.name: AstroWebEngine — Live Demo
games.tagline: The reference server: colonize planets, build fleets, and fight for control of a procedurally generated galaxy.
games.creator: Outer Ring Labs
